mapper.select: select * from Routes left join Permissions on Routes.perm=Permissions.id left join Groups_Permissions on Permissions.id=Groups_Permissions.permission_id left join PermissionGroups on PermissionGroups.id=Groups_Permissions.group_id left join Roles_Groups on Roles_Groups.group_id=PermissionGroups.id left join Roles on Roles.id=Roles_Groups.role_id left join User on User.role_id=Roles.id where Routes.`status`=1 and User.id = #{id} and Routes.client_id = #{clientId};
